title: [Submission] Warmdown Scheduling - 1.2430 BPB on 8×H100 SXM
author: MajdiZamim

data.description: Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads in the GPT-style model.

novel_contributions: Increased WARMDOWN_ITERS so cosine warmdown actually triggers within the wallclock-limited training run.
Improved convergence by ensuring learning rate decay occurs in the final portion of training.
Used a 3000-iteration warmdown schedule instead of the default 1200 iterations.
